章节或表格: 3.5.4. Physical and Chemical Properties of APO and Synthesized Biodiesel. The detailed physicochemical characteristics of the starting palm oil and the biodiesel synthesized in this investigation were determined and are listed in Table 4. The kinematic viscosity of the biodiesel produced is comparable to the standard values of the ASTM D6751 standard:126-130 the acid value of the biodiesel was found to be 0.350 mg KOH $\mathbf { g } ^ { - 1 }$ and that of APO was 0.645 mg KOH $\mathbf { g } ^ { - 1 }$ , while the calorific value of biodiesel was 37.89 MJ $\mathrm { K g ^ { - 1 } \left( T a b l e 4 \right) }$ and that of APO was 21.43 MJ $\mathrm { K g ^ { - 1 } }$ . The flash point is an important parameter that must be considered during the storage of any (flammable) liquid fuel. The flash point of the biodiesel was $1 4 { \dot { 5 } } . { \dot { 5 } } 0 \ ^ { \circ } \mathrm { C } ,$ a value that is within the range according to the recommendations of the ASTM D975 standard. The values of the physicochemical characteristics obtained in this work are fundamentally due to the composition of those of APO and biodiesel.125−132 However, the values are within the standards established by the ASTM, so the green biodiesel obtained by means of the biocatalysts synthesized in this research is of good quality. 126−130；表格 A28_p15_t247

章节或表格: 3.1. Results of the Unmodified Supports: Textural Analysis of the Starting MOF-199 and ZIF-8. The morphological properties of MOF-199 and ZIF-8 were determined by nitrogen adsorption analysis at 77.0 K. The results show that the commercial starting MOFs present type I isotherms, according to recent IUPAC recommendations, which are shown in Figure 1. A detailed analysis of these adsorption− desorption isotherms of these starting MOFs shows a microporous network for ZIF-8 (pore size <2 nm). If the area of study of the isotherm at low pressure is extended for this ZIF-8, it is observed that it has a slight change in the trend of the isotherm corresponding to type VI behavior. This phenomenon has already been analyzed in the scientific literature, which, according to the researchers, is explained by a possible structural flexibility that is induced by the gas on the ZIF-8 structure, while some authors argue that this behavior is due to the very weak interaction between the adsorbate and adsorbent. The literature has also reported this interesting phenomenon.48−50 The microporous volume is $0 . 8 8 ~ \mathrm { c m } ^ { 3 } ~ \mathrm { g } ^ { - 1 }$ as calculated by applying the DA method. The synthesized sample is a microporous material with a BET specific surface of $\stackrel { \bullet } { 1 } 7 5 0 \ \mathrm { m } ^ { 2 } \ \mathrm { g } ^ { - 1 }$ (relative pressure calculated from 0.009 to 0.02).；表格 A28_p5_t123
需校验内容: DA (CO2): MOF-199

需校验内容: novel MOF-poly(acrylic acid) (PAA) hybrid material (MPHM) featuring an “active core-skeleton-shell” architecture. 章节或表格: 3.2.1.2. Reaction solution pH. The pH of the reaction solution is an important factor affecting the catalytic activity of the lipase, which is often reduced by altering the charge balance of the lipase active site [17]. According to Fig. $^ { 6 , }$ in the pH range of 6 to 8, the relative activity reaches its maximum at pH 7, which generates a large decrease in the relative activity with either increasing or decreasing pH. An overly acidic or alkaline environment can affect the spatial conformation of the lipase molecule or even inactivate it. At the same time, the $\mathrm { U i O } { \cdot } 6 6 { \cdot } \mathrm { N H } _ { 2 }$ carrier itself is acidic, which makes it difficult to maintain the activity of the lipase molecules when they are bound to the carrier matrix by the impact of Lewis acid sites. Therefore, the immobilized lipase exhibited the highest activity at reaction solution of $^ { \cdot } { } _ { 7 , \cdot }$ which has been reported to confirm this. Kuang et al. [10] showed that Aspergillus oryzae lipase immobilized on $\mathrm { U i O - } 6 6 { \mathrm { - } } \mathrm { N H _ { 2 } { \mathrm { - } } O A }$ substrate showed the maximum recovery of lipase activity (510%) at pH 7.0. Saadiah et al. [18] tested ROL at different pH conditions Specific lipase activity and activity recovery of ROL immobilized on hybridized dobby carbon nanotubes, it was observed that both activity recovery and specific lipase activity were maximum at pH 7.0.
